name: Maskared
short_description: Endure as long as you can, harness the power of unique masks, and conquer your foes in Maskared!
detailed_description:
Maskared is an exciting 2D game where you take control of a mask representing one of the Chinese zodiac signs. Each mask has unique abilities that influence your gameplay, allowing for different strategies in every run.

Prepare to dodge treacherous shurikens as you strive to achieve the highest survival score possible. With each successful maneuver, you accumulate points that can be used to unlock new masks and abilities, becoming more powerful with each challenge overcome.

Featuring a vibrant and colorful visual style, Maskared offers a dynamic and engaging experience where agility and precision are key. In every game, you’ll have the opportunity to refine your skills and discover which mask best suits your playstyle.

Dive into this action-packed and strategic world, and prove that you can conquer the challenges of Maskared!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
